name: test_app
description: A curated library of minimal web applications serving as test targets for a Playwright-based testing framework.

scripts.start:all: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "npm start --prefix apps/vanilla-html" "npm start --prefix apps/react-app" "npm start --prefix apps/vue-app" "npm start --prefix apps/angular-app" "npm start --prefix apps/svelte-app" "npm start --prefix apps/nextjs-app" "npm start --prefix apps/lit-app" "npm start --prefix apps/htmx-app"
